headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 2 RBI. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Jacob Wilson of the Athletics was placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. The New York Yankees also placed José Caballero on the 10-day injured list with a right middle finger fracture. Other teams affected by injuries include the Atlanta Braves, Toronto Blue Jays, Detroit Tigers, and Los Angeles Dodgers.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Arizona Diamondbacks acquired Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense with 2 RBI. Joey Cantillo earned the win for the Guardians, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles edged the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers 1-0**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow victory over the Texas Rangers, winning 1-0. Michael Soroka led the Diamondbacks' pitching effort, throwing 6.1 innings with 5 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Edge Angels in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 3-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Vaughn Grissom and Angel Martínez delivering key hits for the winning team. Slade Cecconi's strong performance on the mound helped seal the win for the Guardians.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren leading the pitching effort. Aaron Judge and José Caballero (New York Yankees) were among the impact hitters in the game.

top_news.title: **Athletics Place Jacob Wilson on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation, effective retroactive to May 11, 2026. The injury occurred on May 11, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
